title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 March 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 March 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 March 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 22/03/2024
The ship recycling market across India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, and Turkiye presents a mixed landscape. In India, market conditions have shown volatility, initially marking an improvement
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-03-22_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-14-March-22-March-2024.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
14 March 2024 - 22 March 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling market across India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, and Turkiye presents a mixed landscape. In India, market conditions have shown volatility,
initially marking an improvement but facing a downturn as the week progressed, potentially influenced by the Holi festival's impact on market sentiment.
